name: Unchained Enma Lord Yama
desc:
2+ monsters, including an "Unchained Soul" monster
During your End Phase: You can target up to 2 Fiend monsters in your GY that were destroyed and sent there this turn; Special Summon them, but you cannot Special Summon, except Fiend monsters, while you control either of those face-up monsters. If this card on the field would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy 1 face-up card on either field instead. You can only use each effect of "Unchained Enma Lord Yama" once per turn.
